channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Some top tech leaders have embraced Trump. That's created a political divide in Silicon Valley
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Like many in the tech industry, Jeremy Lyons used to think of himself as a relatively apolitical guy.
item.dc:creator: NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Via porn, gore and ultra-violence, extremist groups are sinking hooks online into the very young
item.description: PARIS (AP) — After his arrest, the boy's mother was stunned to discover that her 12-year-old had been learning how to kill and gorging on videos of decapitation and torture so gruesome they made even case-hardened French court officials look away.
item.dc:creator: JOHN LEICESTER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Japanese leader says he hopes Osaka expo will help reunite a divided world
item.description: OSAKA, Japan (AP) — Japanese Prime Minister Shigeru Ishiba, speaking at Saturday's opening ceremony for the Osaka expo, expressed his hope that the event will help restore global unity in a world plagued by conflicts and trade wars.
item.dc:creator: AYAKA McGILL and MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What it means to be an AI-augmented leader
item.description: Rasmus Hougaard is the founder and managing partner of Potential Project. In 2019 he was nominated by Thinkers50 as one of the eight most important leadership thinkers in the world.
item.dc:creator: Next Big Idea Club, Fast Company

item.title: The Secret to Better Coffee: Pouring Water Slowly from a Height Revealed
item.description: Researchers have discovered the secret to brewing tastier, well-rounded coffee without using any extra beans – and it's pouring water slowly from a height.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: White House record-keeping revamp
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DHS employees consider workforce transition amid major uncertainty
item.description: Staff across DHS, including at CISA and FEMA, are considering deferred resignation or other offers amid reports that their agencies will be targeted for cuts. The post DHS employees consider workforce transition amid major uncertainty first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Apple flew 600 tons of iPhones from India to the US to avoid Trump tariffs
item.description: Apple chartered six planes to fly 600 tons of iPhones into the US from India to avoid President Donald J. Trump’s tariffs, Reuters reports. That’s an estimated equivalent of up to 1.5 million smartphones.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Garmin has just crossed a powerful bike light with a 4K dash cam – and as a cyclist, I’m all in
item.description: Garmin has just announced a powerful front bike light that also doubles as a 4K camera for capturing run-ins with other road users.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: Groundcover grows funding for eBPF-based observability tech
item.description: When Groundcover entered the observability market in 2021, it was already a mature market with established vendors.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Two tempting budget Bluetooth turntables just landed in the UK, in time for Record Store Day 2025
item.description: Majority launches two vinyl players for Record Store Day and every other day, and you can choose with or without speakers
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Fatou, the world's oldest gorilla in a zoo, is celebrating her 68th birthday in Berlin
item.description: Fatou, the oldest gorilla living in captivity worldwide, is getting ready for her 68th birthday in style.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 10 new Apple TV+ shows and movies are coming in mid-2025 – here are the 3 I'll be streaming on my Apple TV 4K
item.description: There's lots of great stuff to stream on Apple TV+ in 2025 – but some big names are missing from its latest lineup too.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: I've never been more excited to get my hands on a new handheld: Intel's new graphics driver reportedly provides greater MSI Claw 8 AI+ performance
item.description: Intel's Core Ultra 7 258V processor has taken the MSI Claw AI+ handheld gaming PCs to new heights in terms of performance, and a new graphics driver update has continued the trend.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: CIO Sharon Mandell transforms Juniper Networks for the AI era
item.description: CIOs have elevated their stature in the business by driving digital transformations for nearly a decade. Now, top-level IT chiefs are taking this formula a step further by putting digital initiatives to work in helping transform the business itself.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: More and faster: New proposals changing Python from within
item.description: Top picks for Python readers on InfoWorld Making Python faster won’t be easy, but it’ll be worth it Python’s malleability and dynamism make it powerful, but also very hard to speed up. Here’s a look at some of the ways developers are working to make Python faster from within.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: DOGE just announced more layoffs at TTS, the government’s vaunted tech group, sources say
item.description: Thomas Shedd, who directs the General Services Administration’s vaunted tech group, Technology Transformation Services (TTS), has just announced that a new round of firings has begun at TTS, insiders tells Fast Company.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Three key federal cyber regulations to watch under Trump
item.description: GOP lawmakers are focused on harmonizing key cyber regulations, including CISA’s proposed incident reporting rule and HHS’ new cyber update to HIPAA. The post Three key federal cyber regulations to watch under Trump first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: A quick win for DOGE? Make procurement competitive again
item.description: If DOGE is looking for a high-value, high-return target, the software procurement process is an easy win. The post A quick win for DOGE? Make procurement competitive again first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Hackers breach Morocco's social security database in an unprecedented cyberattack
item.description: RABAT, Morocco (AP) — Morocco 's social security agency said troves of data were stolen from its systems in a cyberattack this week that resulted in personal information being leaked on the messaging app Telegram.
item.dc:creator: SAM METZ, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Apple’s Macs are powering the PC market’s recovery
item.description: Maybe the forced Windows upgrades are to blame. Perhaps it’s the bad karma created by the Crowdstrike debacle. Or possibly, computer users have finally become convinced by Apple.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cisco: Latest news and insights
item.description: Cisco is the dominant vendor in enterprise networking, and under CEO Chuck Robbins, it continues to shake things up. Its most recent mega-acquisition is its $28 billion purchase of Splunk, a bold move that adds revenue opportunities in observability, data analytics, AIOps, and genAI.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: CISA under review: Trump memo spurs scrutiny and uncertainty
item.description: The Trump administration has issued a directive against Christopher Krebs, the founding director and former head of the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) for weaponizing and abusing his government authority during his tenure.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How Trump's trade war with China will hit tech prices
item.description: President Trump’s escalating trade war with China is putting a spotlight on the various technology companies and products poised to feel the ripple effects of the ongoing conflict.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Microsoft says it's 'slowing or pausing' some AI data center projects, including $1B plan for Ohio
item.description: Microsoft said it is “slowing or pausing” some of its data center construction, including a $1 billion project in Ohio, the latest sign that the demand for artificial intelligence technology that drove a massive infrastructure expansion might not need quite as many powerful computers as expected.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: 200 million social media records leaked in major X data breach
item.description: X hit with massive data breach with 200 million records leaked, including emails. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson offers seven tips to help protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google’s Agent2Agent open protocol aims to connect disparate agents
item.description: Google has taken the covers off a new open protocol — Agent2Agent (A2A) — that aims to connect agents across disparate ecosystems.
item.dc:creator: Info World
